objective: AUTO_FOLDER_REFACTOR_BUGFIND visibility refactor: expose gateway event decoder wire-payload assumptions and preserve invalid-payload bad_response contract.
completedSlices: Added replayable regression coverage for malformed JSON string, non-object JSON string, and normal decoded map event payloads in navivox_gateway_event_decoder_regression_test.dart.
Extracted navivoxGatewayObjectFromWireEvent and navivoxInvalidGatewayEvent from navivoxGatewayEventFromWire, making decode/null/error boundaries explicit.
Fixed exposed bug: malformed JSON WebSocket payloads no longer throw FormatException; they return the documented bad_response event.
nextCandidates: Gateway message/event model parsing drift in navivox_gateway_event.dart and navivox_gateway_message.dart: compare optional raw strings vs protocol trimmed string helpers for hidden validation inconsistencies.
